fields.title: Create prompts app with stored prompt workflow
fields.prompt_text: Create a "prompts" app with a Stored Prompt model that we can use to preserve the intent of the original request after development is complete. Ensure each change we make adds a fixture with the prompt and ties it to any useful implementation context. No migrations required, we depend on new fixtures getting auto-imported. Each prompt should also include an initial implementation plan: refined out of the original prompt and stored with it. Include agent.md advice on performing this task.
fields.initial_plan: 1) Create a dedicated prompts app and register a StoredPrompt model in admin. 2) Persist the original request plus a refined implementation plan in seed fixtures. 3) Capture relevant change context in each stored prompt fixture (optional change reference + JSON context). 4) Keep fixtures aligned with the model and add operational guidance in agent.md so future changes repeat this process.

context.notes: Change references are optional and may be left blank.
